title: podochilus microphyllus
intro: Podochilus microphyllus, also known as the small-leaved Podochilus, is a species of orchid that is native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections, among others. In herbal preparations, Podochilus microphyllus is often used in the form of extracts or infusions, and is also used in traditional remedies like teas and poultices.
